message:
fix(node): replace silent failures with explicit error handling in 4 modules

Replaces patterns that silently swallow errors (unwrap_or_default, let _ =,
.ok()) with explicit error handling that provides actionable diagnostics.

- connector/rollback_bundle.rs: Replace unwrap_or_default() with .expect()
  including clear context for RestoreManifest serialization failures
- control_plane/audience_token.rs: Add explicit error check for missing
  leaf token with descriptive error message instead of proceeding with
  invalid state
- policy/approval_workflow.rs: Replace .ok() with .expect() on
  serialization + add case-insensitive approver identity comparison
  for stronger access control validation
- supply_chain/revocation_integration.rs: Replace silent let _ = with
  .expect() for zone initialization, enforcing fail-fast on invalid
  zone configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
